---
title: "Research"
---

My research interests are local service delivery, local autonomy, social network analysis, urban shrinkage.

I am currently involved in:

```{mermaid}
gantt
    title My Current Projects
    dateFormat MM-DD-YYYY
    section Section
        A task          :a1, 03-03-2024, 30d
        Another task    :after a1, 20d
    section Another
        Task in Another :03-03-2024, 12d
        another task    :24d

```
